scripts.build: npm run build:chromium && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:chromium: BROWSER_TARGET=chromium vite build && BROWSER_TARGET=chromium BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs chromium
scripts.build:firefox: BROWSER_TARGET=firefox vite build && BROWSER_TARGET=firefox BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && node scripts/write-manifest.mjs firefox
